ddls:
CREATE TABLE "homeowners" (
  "homeowner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each homeowner */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the homeowner (e.g., age, income level) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the homeowner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for follow-up purposes */,
  "homeowner_type" TEXT /* Type of homeowner (e.g., single, family, renter) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment) */,
  "property_size" TEXT /* Size of the property (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "property_age" TEXT /* Age of the property (e.g., new, old) */,
  "consent" TEXT /* Consent for data usage and sharing (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("homeowner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "homeowner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the homeowner providing the response */,
  "insurance_coverage" TEXT /* Flood insurance coverage response */,
  "use_fans" TEXT /* Usage of fans response */,
  "grow_food" TEXT /* Food growing habits response */,
  "temp_setting" TEXT /* Water heater temperature setting response */,
  "efficient_bulbs" TEXT /* Energy-efficient bulb usage response */,
  "compost_food" TEXT /* Composting food waste response */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was completed */,
  "response_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the response (e.g., complete, incomplete) */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes from the homeowner */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the survey (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_homeowner_id FOREIGN KEY ("homeowner_id") REFERENCES homeowners ("homeowner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "insurance_percent" REAL /* Percentage of homeowners with flood insurance coverage */,
  "fans_usage_percent" REAL /* Percentage of homeowners using fans */,
  "food_growing_percent" REAL /* Percentage of homeowners growing food */,
  "temp_setting_percent" REAL /* Percentage of homeowners setting water heater temps to 120° or below */,
  "efficient_bulbs_percent" REAL /* Percentage of homeowners using efficient bulbs */,
  "compost_percent" REAL /* Percentage of homeowners composting food waste */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date when the summary was generated */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region associated with the summary */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic associated with the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_summary_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_summary_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response expected (e.g., multiple choice, yes/no) */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., energy, water, waste) */,
  "question_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the question in the overall survey (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or characteristics of the region */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region (e.g., temperate, tropical) */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income level in the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the homeowner */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the homeowner */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the homeowner (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the homeowner (e.g., professional, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the summary entry associated with the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation for homeowners */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was generated */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the recommendation (e.g., all, specific demographic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_summary_id FOREIGN KEY ("summary_id") REFERENCES responses_summary ("summary_id")
)
